## TRM1.1. Terminal and airport ANS ATFM arrival delay per flight (KPI#2)

Average ATFM arrival delay in Switzerland was 2.07 min/arr in 2025, the first year of RP4. The **performance has worsened compared to 2024**, last year of RP3, when there were 1.78 min/arr.

Out of the two airports included in RP4, Zurich had delays of 2.73 min/arr and Geneva 1.03 min/arr. Aside from weather, operational challenges came from Zurich TTMS live trials and Geneva A-CDM systems replacement, as well as aerodrome capacity regulations in both.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM Arrival delay across Member States in 2025 was 0.97 min/arr.
